explanation: The recommendation promises organization-wide configuration evidence but no exact premise or applicability condition states that AWS Config must be enabled in every intended source account and Region. AWS says aggregators do not enable Config and data is generated only where Config is enabled.
required_action: Add and verify an atomic premise for source-account/Region AWS Config enablement and carry it as an applicability condition for the claimed organization-wide evidence scope.
suggested_revision: Limit the recommendation to intended accounts and Regions where AWS Config is enabled and included in the aggregator.

supporting_source.locator: Considerations > Aggregators do not automatically enable AWS Config on your behalf
supporting_source.title: Authorizing Aggregator Accounts to Collect AWS Config Configuration and Compliance Data
